items.title: VCR: Consumer Discretionary Dashboard For September
items.description: This monthly article series provides a top-down analysis of the consumer discretionary sector based on fundamental metrics. Read the latest analysis here.

items.title: Citigroup Maintains Buy on McDonald's, Raises Price Target to $381
items.description: Citigroup  analyst Jon Tower   maintains McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) with a Buy and raises the price target from $373 to $381.

items.title: Krispy Kreme: Waiting For The Donuts To Get Cheap Again
items.description: Krispy Kreme (DNUT) is in the midst of a turnaround, focusing on refranchising, outsourcing, and debt reduction to improve profitability.
